description: Sample 0 角色的模拟 Onboarding 信息，基于 locomo10.json 中 observation 字段提取

_source_observation_summary.identity: Transgender woman, started transitioning 3 years ago, moved from Sweden 4 years ago
_source_observation_summary.career: Pursuing counseling/mental health career, attended LGBTQ+ counseling workshop, mentoring LGBTQ youth
_source_observation_summary.family: Single, researching adoption agencies to build a family, passed adoption interviews
_source_observation_summary.interests_details: Painting (since age 17, focuses on trans experience), piano (learning), acoustic guitar (5 years), reading (Becoming Nicole), hiking
_source_observation_summary.community: Active in LGBTQ+ activism (Connected LGBTQ Activists group), pride parades, art shows, youth center volunteering
_source_observation_summary.values: Self-acceptance, community support, authentic expression, helping others

_source_observation_summary.identity: Married for 5 years, mother of multiple kids, manages kids and work
_source_observation_summary.career: Artist - painting (7 years) and pottery, values art as therapeutic self-expression
_source_observation_summary.family: Husband and kids, dog Luna, cat Oliver, another cat Bailey
_source_observation_summary.interests_details: Painting (landscapes, still life, animals, nature-inspired, abstract), pottery, running (for mental health), violin, clarinet, camping, hiking, reading, classical music (Bach, Mozart)
_source_observation_summary.community: Volunteered at homeless shelter with family, supports Caroline's LGBTQ advocacy
_source_observation_summary.values: Family time, self-care, creativity, inclusivity, nature appreciation
